li.label: bipolar
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} suffers from extreme mood swings. They are capable of plunging into the deepest despairs, but when things are going perfectly, they enter periods of intense euphoria and reckless behavior.

li.label: PTSD
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} suffers from Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder. Lingering combat memories or traumatic injuries cause them to experience sudden, wild shooting triggers followed by periods of catatonic fear.
